name: A Fourth Clan — FanClans
description:
There have always been stories of another Clan. Now, there is finally cause to believe them.

"The air is colder here;

The ground may hurt your paws,

But better salt than a mountain cat's claws."

MarshClan proverb

Sorry there is only a MarshClan starting scenario! More are on the way, as soon as I can get them to you.

CliffClan Allegiances

  • Medicine cats are not prohibited from having kittens in CliffClan, because they have so few cats.

  • CliffClan does not have apprentices or mentors. Instead, after a cat leaves kit hood, they learn from everyone in the Clan what they need to survive.

LEADER:

SLATE—long haired blue-grey tom-cat with blue eyes and a white chest.

DEPUTY:

TALON—short haired grey tabby tomcat with white socks and blue eyes.

MEDICINE CAT:

MOSS—long haired white tomcat with black spots and yellow eyes.

WARRIORS:

SNAKE—short haired grey tabby she-cat with dark grey stripes, a white belly, and yellow eyes.

CROW—black tomcat with long fur and yellow eyes.

CAP—short haired white she-cat with a light grey cap and green eyes.

STONE—deep grey tomcat with amber eyes.

RAVEN—black she-cat with long fur and blue eyes.

PEBBLE—short haired white she-cat with grey ears and yellow eyes.

LIZARD—black tom-cat with a grey mask and green eyes.

SNOW—long-haired white she-cat with green eyes.

FALCON—short haired grey and white brindled tomcat with blue eyes.

QUEENS:

LICHEN—short-haired, pale grey she-cat with long fur and yellow eyes.

SLEET—brownish-grey she-cat with yellow eyes. (Ravine, Pool, Firefly).

ELDERS:

MOUSE—stubby, very dark grey tomcat with amber eyes.

MarshClan Allegiances

Only warriors have name suffixes.

LEADER:

RUSHTAIL—a spiky-furred, dark brown she-cat with intimidating yellow eyes. Despite tradition, she chose not to take her nine lives and kept her warrior name, saying that it proved she was stronger than the other leaders.

DEPUTY:

SAWNOSE—a tan tomcat with a brown snip on his nose and amber eyes.

MEDICINE CAT:

MarshClan does not have a medicine cat. Instead, every apprentice learns about herbs and everyone in the Clan cares for hurt or sick cats.

WARRIORS:

FUZZYSUN—an orange tomcat with fluffy fur and golden eyes. Most cats think he is funny, especially in other Clans.

BLEAKSKY—a mottled tabby tomcat with a light brown pelt and green eyes.

BULRUSH—a coarse-furred blue tomcat with a prominent chin and blue eyes. A former loner.

SMALLTROT—a slim black she-cat with white ears and green-yellow eyes.

BOGFUR—a dark brown classic tabby tomcat with a white star on his chest and amber eyes.

COLDSNAP—a startlingly angular white she-cat with blue eyes. At gatherings, it’s apparent how similar she and Lilystripe look.

BURRNOSE—a spiky-furred, dark brown she-cat with a white spot on her muzzle and green eyes. She is Rushtail’s sister, and the only one who can speak out around the leader without getting a claw to her ear.

LOGSNARL—a sleek, spangled brown she-cat colorpoint with a shredded tail and dark blue eyes.

CURLTAIL—an odd-looking white tomcat with a black saddle, amber eyes, and a tail that is permanently kinked over his back.

BLAZEFANG—a grey ticked tabby tomcat with extremely light yellow eyes and protruding upper canines.

APPRENTICES:

DART—a shorthaired, jet black she-cat with a white tail tip and green eyes.

MUD—a plain brown tomcat with yellow eyes.

QUEENS:

QUICKBREEZE—a pretty tortoiseshell she-cat with hazel eyes. (Songkit)

ELDERS:

MarshClan cats to not retire. If they are too old to continue their duties they leave camp or are put to death.

ShrubClan Allegiances

LEADER:

SANDSTAR—a short haired, black and red, spotted tortoiseshell she-cat, with gold eyes.

DEPUTY:

LIONSTORM—a short haired, cinna
creator: D@ND3L10N
